sections.paragraph:
Samson H8123
A judge of Israel
Jdg 16:31
A Danite, son of Manoah; miraculous birth of; a Nazarite from his mother's womb; the mother forbidden to drink wine or strong drink, or to eat any unclean thing during gestation
Jdg 13:7; Jdg 13:25
Desires a Philistine woman for his wife; slays a lion
Jdg 14:7
His marriage feast and the riddle propounded
Jdg 14:19
Slays thirty Philistines
Jdg 14:19
Wife of, estranged
Jdg 14:20; Jdg 15:2
Is avenged for the estrangement of his wife
Jdg 15:8
His great strength
Jdg 15:14; Heb 11:32
Slays a thousand Philistines with the jawbone of an ass
Jdg 15:17
Miraculously supplied with water
Jdg 15:19
Cohabits with Delilah, a harlot; her machinations with the Philistines to overcome him

Is blinded by the Philistines and confined to hard labor in prison; pulls down the pillars of the temple, meets his death and slays a multitude of his enemies
Jdg 16:31; Heb 11:32
